content.en:
The suppression of the Ancient Forbidden Domain has become smaller, and coupled with the fact that the Ancient Beasts are almost extinct, many Ancient Level Geniuses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm dare to enter the Ancient Forbidden Domain.

However, at this time, it is a little difficult to achieve something.

At this time.

Ye Tian didn't have to look for resources in the Ancient Forbidden Domain, if he copied the Ancient Beast at this time, he would be killed by those Bone Transformation Realms anyway.

As a result, he abandoned the Primeval Forbidden Domain.

Anyway, for him, there is no way to obtain a large amount of resources in the Ancient Forbidden Domain.

"The territorial sea boundary has been upgraded, there should be more than one ancient treasure land like this, and it will slowly appear in the future, and there will be no shortage of opportunities. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

In the primeval ruins of the territorial sea boundary, a golden light shone on the entire primeval ruins, spreading and extending into the endless territory.

This kind of vision immediately attracted a lot of blood transformation realms, and even alarmed the existence of bone transformation realms.

Ye Tian also came here for the first time after getting the news.

"What's going on?"

"This area illuminated by golden light is too big, it must be an unimaginable treasure!"

"Even if a treasure is born, it's not something we can compete for, it must be those bone transformation realms that are qualified to compete for it. "

"Let's just take a look at the excitement, don't get too close, otherwise be careful to die!"

There is a lot of discussion about the blood transformation realm here.

"What the hell is this?"

Ye Tian saw the Lord of Darkness and asked curiously.

The Lord of Darkness looked at the golden light that stretched over a vast area, and a guess came to his mind.

"It's a bit like the picture of the birth of the primeval golden tree!" the dark lord guessed, "In the primeval period, the primeval golden tree was born, and it was like this, but the scale was not so large!"

"Could it be the second primeval golden tree?"

Ye Tian guessed.

"Can this give birth to a second primeval golden tree?" the Lord of Darkness was shocked.

"I don't know, it's just a guess!"

Ye Tian didn't dare to guarantee that this was the vision of the primeval golden tree!

Whew!!

More and more bone degeneration is coming.

The Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Void are also here one by one.

Similarly, Ye Tian's three vests also came.

The Bone Transformation Realm did not break into the depths of the primeval ruins, but quietly waited for the vision to end, after all, no one dared to guarantee that there was no danger, and there was no need to rush in.

Moreover, if the vision is not over, the treasure that is conceived will definitely not be completely conceived, and it will not be of much value to snatch it.

As time passed, the golden light became more and more dim.

Gradually, the image of an ancient gold tree was projected.

"It's really the Ancient Golden Tree!!!"

A group of bone transformation realms were shocked.

The primeval gold tree in the boundary of the territorial sea was destroyed in the primeval era, and now another primeval gold tree has been born.

"This primeval gold tree is much bigger than the primeval gold tree of the primeval era!"

The Lord of the Void said.

Before the primeval era, there was no primeval golden tree, and there was no primeval technique, so the master of the cave void did not become an primeval-level genius, but only a boundary-breaking genius from beginning to end.

Later, when he learned about the Ancient Technique, he was already in the Bone Transformation Realm.

Because of this, the top group of bone transformation realms in the territorial sea boundary gap were not primeval-level geniuses.

After a period of time, the primeval golden tree was completely born.

At this time.

The breath of the primeval golden tree permeated.

Its power is much more powerful than that of the primeval golden tree of the primeval era.

"The value of this primeval gold tree is very high, the primeval root pith of its root system must be very valuable, and even the primeval gold juice bred inside the primeval gold tree will be very valuable. The Lord of Darkness muttered.

That's when it happened.

The Lord of the Void and the Lord of the Ruins snatched the Ancient Golden Tree.

Bang!!!!!

Their attack landed on the Ancient Golden Tree, which was instantly torn apart.

Click!!!

The Ancient Golden Tree continued to crack, shattered into pieces by their attacks, and they interfered with each other.

Although most of the Ancient Golden Tree parts were snatched away by the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void, there were still fragments that flew out and were snatched by the other Bone Transformation Realms.

Ye Tian and the three vests all snatched it.

"This primeval gold leaf belongs to me!"

Ye Tian grabbed an ancient gold leaf.

However, most of the bone transformation realms have no interest in the primeval golden leaf, perhaps they feel that their strength is a lot of primeval techniques, and they don't need the primeval golden leaf.

They are more keen on snatching the other parts of the Ancient Golden Tree, and even if they are not useful to themselves, it is not bad to cultivate more strong people.

Besides, this primeval gold tree is so huge, perhaps the primeval root marrow and primeval gold juice contained in it are both valuable to the bone transformation realm!

After some scramble and snatching, one of the bone transformation realms left, for fear that other bone transformation realms would snatch their treasures.

Ye Tian also snatched some of them, chose to leave, and returned to Wanlong's territorial waters.

And the three vests also snatched a little, and then left.

Gradually, this area regained its calm, but it had been broken into countless pieces by many bone transformation realms, and the space kept crumbling, making it difficult to recover.

......

"I snatched six primeval gold leaves, some primeval gold juice and some primeval root marrow, it's okay!"

Ye Tian muttered.

These Ancient Gold Juice and Ancient Root Essence were completely different from the Ancient Gold Juice and Ancient Root Essence he had in the past, and the energy contained was many times more powerful, and the energy was more advanced.

Subsequently.

He took out a little Ancient Gold Juice and Ancient Root Marrow and tested it, the effect on the Eight Blood Transformation Realm and the Nine Blood Transformation Realm was too good, and he could easily create an ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

It was also of great help to the primordial-level genius, and he directly gave some to his son.

Of course, it is also helpful for bone degeneration, but the help is not too great, and it is much worse than the archaeal root pith.

However, those bone transformation realms must be very satisfied with these primeval root marrows, and will use these primeval root marrows to refine the immeasurable bones.

"This Ancient Gold Leaf !!!!"

Ye Tian didn't pay much attention to them at first, but after carefully contemplating them, he was shocked.

"It is worthy of being the most valuable ancient gold leaf of the Taikoo Gold Tree, and I know that these Taikoo Gold Leaves are not simple!"

Ye Tian was excited, what was recorded above was indeed an ancient technique, but it was not an ordinary ancient technique!

He had cultivated ordinary primeval techniques before, but now what was recorded above them was the top primeval techniques.

Other than that.

The grade of the top-level primeval technique is much higher than that of the ordinary primeval technique, and it has actually crossed the level.

"The Bone Transformation Realm can't cultivate ordinary primeval techniques, I don't know if I can cultivate these top-notch primeval techniques?"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had been enlightened for a while, and soon he understood.

The Bone Transformation Realm can indeed cultivate the top primeval technique, and this top-notch primeval technique will also affect the bones, if there is no bone transformation realm, neither the body nor the bones can carry the power of the primeval technique.

Therefore, the top-notch primeval technique is the primeval technique prepared for the bone transformation realm.

It's just that for non-primeval-level geniuses, the difficulty of cultivating the top-level primeval technique is more than ten times that of the primeval-level genius to practice the top-level primeval technique, and once the cultivation fails, the foundation will be seriously damaged, and I am afraid that it will be aggravated even more.
